title: select_with_fee zero-change overcounts outputs: silent mismatch if GRACE_ACTIONS changes
description: select_with_fee always passes sapling_logical_actions(n, 2) for 2 outputs, but build_shielded_tx only adds change output when change > 0. Works only because GRACE_ACTIONS=2 makes max(n,1)==max(n,2). If ZIP-317 reduces GRACE_ACTIONS or a contributor changes output count without reading the coupling comment, fee computed by select_with_fee disagrees with FeeRule::standard() in builder.build(). Fix: debug_assert in build_shielded_tx verifying selected fee matches actual output count fee.
